data.name: 與經紀人戀愛是絕對禁止2
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


關於此遊戲



◆故事：
你是一個王牌經紀人，卻遭到戀人兼旗下最大牌的女明星夏又晴背叛，不得不重新開始。
獨具慧眼的你，在茫茫人海中找到兩枚發光的原石。一個是黑長直氣質美女宋允真，
除了有古典美的超高顏值外還是個創作才女。
另一個則是截然相反、染著一頭金髮穿著潮流服飾的火辣台妹Rainie。
資源有限的你，只能簽約其中一人將她們打造成一代巨星，未選中的另一人，
則會被魔鬼前任夏又晴簽走，成為你的頭號敵人。
施展渾身解數，讓你的藝人成為一代傳奇吧！





◆玩法：
戀愛模擬養成遊戲兼時間管理大師。
你將扮演經紀人貼身替你的藝人打造全方位的星攻略，
培育數值、接取更多的通告，讓可愛的偶像發光發熱吧！



◆遊戲特色
◇雙女主，共有兩套劇本，體驗全劇情至少需要二週目
◇12萬字豐富劇本，扣人心弦的劇情
◇天賦與技能系統，在有趣的藝能戰鬥中贏得勝利
◇通告系統，影視／唱片／綜藝全概括，打造你的三金女神
◇20組以上的全Live 2D動態色圖讓您血脈噴張，欲罷不能！
◇換裝系統
◇女主角全語音

data.short_description: 身為一個專業的經紀人，除了要管理旗下偶像的行程，還得負責身體保健的部分，你我都知道應該怎麼做的。雙女主路線，沒被選到的那一個將成為宿敵一路與你較勁。海量豐富有趣的劇情、超過20組的超精緻Live2d；加上極高的遊戲性－－一起來替可愛的偶像們進行時間管理吧！
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 14.04 or Steam OS 2.0 (64 bit)

data.name: Idol Hands 2
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


About the Game



Story
Your life and career as a top talent manager come crashing down as your top talent Summer Hsia betrays you to manage a massive entertainment conglomerate. She takes everything from you, leaving you with nothing.
Determined to regain your dignity as a manager, you decide to start over and find some new talent to nurture. You have your eyes set on two diamonds in the rough and they couldn’t be more different.
Evelyn Song’s stunningly dignified beauty and her exceptional creative talent make her a great candidate, but you can’t write off Rainie Lin’s bright attitude, trendy fashion sense, and incredibly sexy body.
Unfortunately, you only have enough resources to manage one of them. The girl you don’t choose ends up in the hands of your worst enemy: Summer Hsia.
Do your best to nurture your talent, and make her a star!





Gameplay
Manage your talent’s time and mood in this management + love simulator.
Allocate the limited time you have each month to various jobs, lessons, and gigs. These will help your talent earn money, raise certain stats, gain fame, and/or unlock events.
Participate in performance battles against your fellow celebrities for fame and all sorts of bonuses.
More contacts, events, and gigs become available as her abilities and fame increase.




Features
◇ Two different girls to choose from, with two different scripts. Start with your favorite but play them both!
◇ 4000+ lines of silly banter, heart-pounding drama, and the "good stuff”.
◇ Earn and swap out perks to boost your stats and conquer your performance battles!
◇ Get nominated and win awards in music, film, and television. Nurture the greatest multi-talented celebrity!
◇ Purchase and change outfits at will, either for a job or for your own preferences.
◇ Enjoy listening to Rainie’s and Evelyn’s voices in our fully-dubbed script and H-scenes.
◇ 20+ sets of Live 2D animated H-Scenes. For your pleasure..

data.short_description: Experience two different stories with two different heroines in this love-filled idol management game! Complete with Live 2D-animated H-Scenes!
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, English
*languages with full audio support
